name: COFFEE HOLDING CO INC
summary: Coffee Holding Co., Inc. is an integrated wholesale coffee roaster and dealer based in Staten Island, New York. The company operates across three core segments: wholesale green coffee (unroasted beans sold to roasters and coffee shops), private label coffee (roasted and packaged under customer brand names), and branded coffee (sold under eight proprietary and licensed brand names). Products are distributed to supermarkets, wholesalers, and retail customers across the United States and select Asian markets.

products.name: Wholesale Green Coffee
products.description: Unroasted raw beans imported globally, sold to roasters and coffee shop operators; over 90 specialty offerings.

products.name: Private Label Coffee
products.description: Coffee roasted, blended, and packaged under customers' specifications and brand names for supermarkets and wholesalers.

products.name: Branded Coffee
products.description: Coffee roasted and packaged under eight proprietary and licensed brand names across multiple market segments.

products.name: Tabletop Coffee Roasting Equipment
products.description: Small-scale coffee roasting equipment sold to customers through the Sonofresco subsidiary.

products.name: Cafe Caribe
products.description: Specialty espresso coffee brand targeting Latin consumers; historically the company's leading brand by poundage.

products.name: Cafe Supremo
products.description: Specialty espresso coffee brand priced for price-sensitive Latin espresso drinkers.

products.name: S&W Coffee
products.description: Roasted whole bean and ground coffee sold under the S&W trademark licensed from Del Monte Corporation.

products.name: Harmony Bay
products.description: Coffee brand acquired through Comfort Foods, Inc.; part of ongoing branded coffee growth strategy.

partnerships.description: Exclusive license to use the S&W trademark in the U.S. and approved countries for roasted whole bean and ground coffee retail sales.
Company invested $850,000 for a non-controlling minority interest in December 2025; passive investment with no management involvement.
